title: cleome tetrandra var. simplicifolia
intro: Cleome tetrandra var. simplicifolia, also known as the Himalayan Spurge or Four-angled Spiderflower, is a plant species belonging to the Cleomaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, among others. Cleome tetrandra var. simplicifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
